title: Elevate STEM Prestige
subtitle: A Turnkey Pathway to Elite University Portfolios via the Global br41n.io Hackathon.

ivy.title: Ivy League Admissions
ivy.desc: Admissions officers are flooded with standard "robotics club" applications. A portfolio showcasing applied neuroscience and global hackathon participation instantly elevates a student.

prestige.title: Institutional Prestige
prestige.desc: Becoming an official hub for neurotechnology positions your school as the undisputed regional leader in futuristic education.

interdisciplinary.title: Interdisciplinary Excellence
interdisciplinary.desc: BCI inherently breaks down academic silos, seamlessly blending Computer Science, Biology, Neuroscience, Data Math, and Ethics.

solution.title: Why Schools Cannot Do This Alone
solution.intro: Entering a global BCI hackathon is incredibly complex. It requires expensive research-grade hardware, highly specialized instructors, and complex algorithmic architecture.

mentorship.title: Insider Mentorship:
mentorship.desc: Led by David Wiehls, Official China Host Partner and Global Jury Member for the br41n.io Hackathon.

hardware.title: Hardware Provided:
hardware.desc: We supply the research-grade Unicorn Hybrid Black headsets. Zero procurement risk.

staff.title: Zero Staff Burden:
staff.desc: We manage the pedagogical heavy lifting through our specialized teachers or PD certification.
